prompt: I have a bug in my validation code using Zod — when I call `.transform()` after `.refine()`, the refined value type isn't carrying through. Can you ask the Librarian to look at how Zod chains these methods internally and show me the relevant source?

assertions.text: Contains GitHub source links to Zod repo files
Includes code snippets from the actual source
Explains why the type chain breaks between refine and transform
